title: UI Help
description: Explanation text for non-RMS-language interface chrome (menu items, tabs, status bar fields, Breakdown controls, tool panes) shown by the <HelpTip> component (Phase 1.7) and later the global ALT-hover system (Phase 3.5). Distinct from doc-strings.json, which covers RMS commands/attributes/constants and is shared with the Monaco hover provider (Phase 1.6) — see CREATION_PLAN.md 1.7 and 3.5.

id.description: Dot-separated path matching the HelpTip id used in the component tree, e.g. "titleBar.file", "statusBar.total".

text.description: Short explanation shown in the popup. One or two sentences — this isn't a full doc page.

entries.text: The Breakdown tab shows your script as editable command blocks instead of raw code — good for building without memorizing syntax.
Total resources across the whole map, summed from every create_object placement the parser can see.
